zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthew Goche於大約1566年出生在英國林可爾史爾阿爾維加姆時，他的父親Barnabe Gooch I26歲，母親Mary Darell17歲。他於1585年與Alice Coney在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1624年10月29日在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matthew Goche于大约1566年出生在英国林可爾史爾阿爾維加姆时，他的父亲Barnabe Gooch I26岁，母亲Mary Darell17岁。他于1585年与Alice Coney在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1624年10月29日在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Goche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gotch
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’; see Gooch 3.

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Matthew Goche was born about 1566, in Alvingham, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Barnabe Gooch I, was 26 and his mother, Mary Darell, was 17. He married Alice Coney in 1585, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 29 October 1624, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthew Gocheが約1566年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルヴィンガムで生まれた時，父Barnabe Gooch Iは26歳，母Mary Darellは17歳であった。1585年にイギリスでAlice Coneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1624年10月29日に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matthew Goche(이)가 대략 1566년 영국 링코실르 앨빙함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Barnabe Gooch I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Darell(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1585년 영국에서 Alice Coney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1624년 10월 29일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthew Goche родился около 1566 г. в местности алвингхам, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Barnabe Gooch I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Darell, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Coney в 1585 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 29 октября 1624 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.
